Client Behavior - Realistically, most clients won't travel more than 10-15 miles for services. The further the distance, the lower the chances of conversion even if you generate the lead.
Hi Elena, I hope you're doing well and that you had a great Halloween! I wanted to share some important insights about how the Discovery Agent works and why we focus on hyperlocal optimization.
Local SEO Effectiveness - Local SEO is most powerful at the city level. Expanding beyond your immediate area dilutes your visibility and makes it harder to rank competitively in your core market.
hi, can the post be for a wider area, 30 miles radius, not only manchester
The Discovery Agent is designed for hyperlocal search engine optimization, which works best within a tight geographic area.
i just want to make sure because the 2 towns next to mine are Glastonbury and south windsor where is a lot of potential clients together with hartford and west hartford
Yes Elena
Google's Guidelines - Promoting services beyond a 30-mile radius can trigger flags with Google, which could negatively impact your profile's visibility.
